subject.title: Mathematics Applications & Interpretation (AI)
subject.description:
**IB Mathematics: Applications and Interpretation** is a **Group 5** subject in the **International Baccalaureate Diploma Programme (IBDP)**. It explores **real-world applications of mathematics, statistical analysis, mathematical modeling, and data interpretation**, with a strong focus on **technology use, practical problem-solving, and interpreting mathematical results in context**.

The course is available at **Standard Level (SL, 150 teaching hours)** and **Higher Level (HL, 240 teaching hours)**, with **first assessment in 2021**.

### Assessment at a Glance

| Assessment | Format | SL | HL | Weighting |
|------------|--------|----|----|-----------|
| **Paper 1** | External examination (calculator permitted) | 1h 30min | 2h | SL: 40%, HL: 30% |
| **Paper 2** | External examination (technology required) | 1h 30min | 2h | SL: 40%, HL: 30% |
| **Paper 3** | External examination (technology required) | N/A | 1h | HL: 20% |
| **Mathematical Exploration** | Internal assessment | 30h | 30h | 20% |

strengths: Clear narrative structure with introduction, methodology, results and conclusion
Consistent use of headings, sub-headings and a table of contents supporting navigability
weaknesses: Distracting calculator keystroke descriptions interrupt flow
Occasional long paragraphs and repeated hypotheses reduce conciseness
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Presentation consistently meets band 3 descriptors but falls short of full polish. Logical development is clear, and organization is solid, yet unnecessary detail and minor structural lapses prevent the highest mark. A mid-band score of 2 out of 4 reflects coherent structure tempered by verbosity and occasional digressions.

strengths: Correct use of key statistical terms (p-value, Hâ, df) and notation throughout
Effective inclusion of formulae, tables and screenshots to aid understanding
weaknesses: Minor inconsistencies in subscript and notation (e.g. âÎ³Â²â)
Representation is effective but lacks the sophistication of graphical or dynamic visuals
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Mathematical communication aligns with band 3, offering clear explanations and multiple representations. However, notation slips and limited sophistication prevent a top-band award. A score of 2 out of 4 acknowledges strong clarity while recognizing room for refinement in consistency and depth of representation.

strengths: Topic choice and personal rationale demonstrate genuine engagement beyond a template
Clear personal approach linking F1 context to statistical tests
weaknesses: Analysis relies on routine inferential procedures without novel extensions
Limited creative modelling or original data treatment
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Personal engagement shows significant independent thinking and a clear personal approach but stops short of outstanding creativity. Band 2 descriptors fit well, meriting 2 out of 3.

strengths: Basic commentary on p-values and sample size limitations
weaknesses: Reflection is mostly descriptive with minimal critical depth
Limited discussion of methodological assumptions or broader implications
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Reflection remains at a basic level (band 1), with only limited critique and superficial linkage to understanding. A single mark out of 3 accurately captures this level of development.

strengths: Appropriate selection of SL-level tests (percentages, ÏÂ², t-test)
Numerical results are largely correct and tied back to research questions
weaknesses: Omission of key assumptions (normality, expected frequency thresholds)
Rounding practices introduce minor bias and reduce precision
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Use of mathematics consistently meets band 3 at an appropriate SL level but lacks thorough rigour and sophistication. Multiple methodological weaknesses and rounding issues justify a mid-band score of 2 out of 6.

strandSelections.reasoning: Selecting a personally relevant topic and devising two different statistical tests show independent thinking beyond following a template, but the analysis remains within standard textbook techniques.  Evidence is therefore significant, not outstanding.

The student shows sound understanding of how and why each test is applied, explaining hypotheses, df and interpretation criteria.  Nevertheless, discussion of assumptions (normality, independence) is thin, so understanding is good but not thorough or rigorous.

Numerical work is largely correct: p-values match calculator output and percentage computations are sensible; minor rounding choices are acceptable.  A few transcription slips (e.g. Î¼ notation) do not meaningfully affect correctness.

Discussion stays on the stated aim and the word count is within limits, yet several paragraphs repeat hypotheses and give lengthy lists of TI-84 menu steps that do not advance the mathematics.  Thus the work is relevant and mostly concise rather than uniformly concise, fitting band 3.

Key statistical terms (p-value, Hâ, df) and standard notation (Î¼â, ÏÂ²) are used correctly in most places; subscript/formatting slips (e.g. âÎ³Â²â) occur but do not hinder comprehension.  Hence the language is mostly appropriate rather than perfectly consistent.

Explanations of statistical decisions are clear and largely consistent; minor notation inconsistencies and occasional awkward phrasing prevent full consistency.  This aligns with a clear and mostly consistent standard.

Percentage calculations, ÏÂ² independence testing and a two-sample t-test are all solidly at SL level and relevant to the question.  The mathematics is fit for purpose but not extended or sophisticated, so band 3 is appropriate.

The student includes formulae, a data table, calculator screenshots and a matrix diagram, allowing the reader to visualise the mathematics from multiple angles.  These representations are effective, though not sophisticated (e.g. no graphs or dynamic visuals), matching band 3.

Reflection is confined mainly to a comparison of p-values and a brief comment on sample size limitations.  Depth is limited; the student does not explore broader implications or question methodological robustness in detail.

Using two routine inferential tests on a publicly available data set reflects some initiative but little novelty; creative mathematical modelling or original data treatment is absent.  Hence only limited creativity is evident.

The investigation follows a clear narrative: introduction of the topic, description of data, methodology, calculations, analysis and conclusion.  Transitions between sections are generally smooth and the reader can follow how ideas build on one another, although occasional digressions into calculator keystrokes interrupt the flow.  Overall, the logical chain from question â method â results â interpretation is evident and coherent, but not polished enough for the highest band.

Critical analysis is basic: hypotheses are accepted/rejected based solely on p-value thresholds, with minimal discussion of effect size, assumptions or potential biases.  This fits âbasic analysis with limited critique.â

The student states how results confirm or contradict expectations, but links to personal mathematical understanding remain superficial.  The reflection does not convincingly demonstrate enhanced comprehension, placing it in band 1.

A contents table, consistent headings and sub-headings, and separate appendix/references show solid organisation.  Introduction, body and conclusion are clearly demarcated.  However, minor structural weaknessesâsuch as extensive calculator-button instructions embedded within the methodologyâprevent the report from achieving a fully seamless flow required for band 4.

The focus on a current F1 rivalry and the studentâs own rationale for test choices demonstrate a clear personal approach that drives the exploration, though it does not deeply transform or extend the mathematics.

annotations.comment: The title is concise and clearly conveys the focus of the exploration, engaging the reader with a specific real-world context in Formula 1.
The introductory image lacks a caption or explanation. Consider adding a brief description to clarify its relevance and improve coherence between visual and text.
The table of contents provides a clear roadmap of sections, enhancing navigability and overall organizational clarity.
Page numbers are missing in the contents. Adding page references for each section will improve the readerâs ability to locate key parts quickly.
The introduction is informative but is presented as a single, lengthy paragraph. Splitting into distinct paragraphs (background, aim, personal rationale) would improve readability.
The data collection description is brief and lacks specifics on inclusion/exclusion criteria. Clarify how drivers were selected and why the 2014â2024 range was chosen.
The variable definitions appear reversed: the percentage of wins should be the dependent variable and titles the independent. Correcting this will align methodology to statistical conventions.
The step-by-step calculator instructions disrupt the narrative flow. Consider moving detailed keystrokes to an appendix and summarizing the procedure in the main text.
Null and alternative hypotheses are stated clearly using correct symbolic notation. This demonstrates appropriate use of statistical language.
The methodology omits discussion of key assumptions for chi-square (e.g., expected frequency thresholds). Addressing these would deepen the statistical rigour.
The initial t-test grouping is succinctly presented, showing clear independent sample design. This structure aids understanding of the statistical comparison.
The rationale for choosing a one-tailed test lacks discussion of normality or equal variance assumptions. Include justification for these to strengthen validity.
The use of bullet lists for grouping and procedure clarifies the methodology steps, enhancing readability and logical progression.
Detailed calculator keystrokes continue to interrupt the main argument. Summarize the test procedure in prose and relegate step-by-step keystrokes to an appendix.
Presenting the formula for win percentage with clear notation is effective and ensures consistency when used later in calculations.
Rounding percentages to whole numbers for the chi-square matrix sacrifices precision in expected values. Consider retaining decimals or using a different software approach.
The worked example for Lewis Hamilton demonstrates application of the formula clearly, providing a concrete illustration that aids comprehension.
Inputting rounded win percentages into the chi-square matrix introduces bias. Retain raw decimals or scale the matrix accordingly to avoid distortion.
Including the calculator screenshot for the independence test results helps the reader verify outputs and adds transparency to the calculations.
The manual expected value calculation is thorough, but the exposition is lengthy. Consider summarizing key steps and referencing the formula to maintain conciseness.
The tabular presentation of t-test results is precise and includes all relevant statistics, facilitating clear mathematical communication.
The downward arrow on Sx2 is unconventional and may confuse readers. Use standard notation (e.g., Sâ) to maintain consistent mathematical language.
The analysis succinctly compares p-values to the significance level, yielding clear conclusions that tie back to the research questions.
The conclusion reiterates findings but lacks discussion of broader implications or potential confounders. Extend this section to reflect on the studyâs impact.
The reflection identifies possible extensions but remains descriptive. Incorporate critical evaluation of methodological assumptions to deepen reflection.
Considering factors such as weather, mechanical failures, and team strategy is a valuable initiative. To enhance, discuss how these could be incorporated into future statistical models.
The appendix data table is comprehensive and directly supports the calculations, demonstrating thorough data management.
The reference list mixes citation styles. Adopt a consistent format (e.g., APA or MLA) and include access dates for web sources for greater academic rigor.

The exploration shows some coherence and logical development
Well organized with clear introduction, body and conclusion
The exploration is coherent and shows clear logical development
The exploration is highly coherent with excellent logical development
Exceptionally well organized with seamless flow between sections
No appropriate mathematical language or notation used
Communication is partially clear with inconsistencies
Limited use of appropriate mathematical language and notation
Communication is mostly clear with some consistency
Some appropriate mathematical language and notation used
Communication is clear and mostly consistent
Mostly appropriate mathematical language and notation throughout
Effective use of multiple mathematical representations
Communication is clear and consistent throughout
Sophisticated use of multiple mathematical representations
Consistent and accurate mathematical language and notation throughout
Clear personal approach that drives the exploration
Highly personal approach that enhances understanding
Some relevant mathematics at appropriate level
Relevant mathematics at course level used
Mathematics is correct with minor errors
Relevant mathematics at course level used effectively
Sophisticated relevant mathematics at course level
Mathematics is correct and shows sophistication
Mathematics is precise and demonstrates sophistication
Sophisticated and rigorous mathematics at course level
